_comment: Type tags — every rule whose pattern matches applies. Patterns are case-insensitive regex source strings tested against 'subject + description'. The 'general' rule has no pattern and is the fallback used only when nothing else matches.

rules.label: Job Posting
rules.pattern: assistant professor|associate professor|full professor|faculty position|tenure-track|tenure track|\btenured\b|endowed chair|position announcement|\blecturer\b|postdoc|postdoctoral|job opening|now hiring|we are hiring
